techniques.evidence_quote: TRIPLESTRENGTH leveraged stolen credentials and cookies to gain access to victim cloud environments
the actor had access to credentials for Google Cloud, Amazon Web Services, and Linode
the actor has relied on RACCOON infostealer logs as the source of at least a portion of the stolen credentials and cookies
TRIPLESTRENGTH leveraged stolen credentials and cookies to gain access to victim cloud environments
Once authenticated, the actor uses hijacked cloud projects to mine cryptocurrencies
Once authenticated, the actor uses hijacked cloud projects to mine cryptocurrencies

attack_chain.description: TRIPLESTRENGTH obtained stolen credentials and cookies for cloud services (Google Cloud, AWS, Linode) from RACCOON infostealer logs harvested from victim endpoints.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the actor has relied on RACCOON infostealer logs as the source of at least a portion of the stolen credentials and cookies used in cloud hijacking activities

evidence_chunks.quote: the actor has relied on RACCOON infostealer logs as the source of at least a portion of the stolen credentials and cookies used in cloud hijacking activities
the actor has relied on RACCOON infostealer logs as the source of at least a portion of the stolen credentials and cookies used in cloud hijacking activities

attack_chain.description: TRIPLESTRENGTH used the stolen credentials and cookies to authenticate into victim cloud service accounts across Google Cloud, AWS, and Linode.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: To take over cloud service accounts, TRIPLESTRENGTH leveraged stolen credentials and cookies to gain access to victim cloud environments

evidence_chunks.quote: To take over cloud service accounts, TRIPLESTRENGTH leveraged stolen credentials and cookies to gain access to victim cloud environments
To take over cloud service accounts, TRIPLESTRENGTH leveraged stolen credentials and cookies to gain access to victim cloud environments

attack_chain.description: After authenticating, the actor hijacked cloud projects to deploy cryptocurrency mining workloads at the victim's expense.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Once authenticated, the actor uses hijacked cloud projects to mine cryptocurrencies

evidence_chunks.quote: Once authenticated, the actor uses hijacked cloud projects to mine cryptocurrencies
Once authenticated, the actor uses hijacked cloud projects to mine cryptocurrencies

attack_chain.description: TRIPLESTRENGTH personas advertised resale of access to compromised servers/cloud platforms on Telegram channels.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: personas connected to the group routinely advertise access to servers, including those from prominent hosting providers and cloud platforms, such as Google Cloud, Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, Linode, OVHCloud, and Digital Ocean

evidence_chunks.quote: personas connected to the group routinely advertise access to servers, including those from prominent hosting providers and cloud platforms, such as Google Cloud, Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, Linode, OVHCloud, and Digital Ocean

personas connected to the group routinely advertise access to servers, including those from prominent hosting providers and cloud platforms, such as Google Cloud, Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, Linode, OVHCloud, and Digital Ocean

initial_access_vector: Stolen credentials and session cookies harvested from RACCOON infostealer logs on victim endpoints, used to log into cloud service accounts (Google Cloud, AWS, Linode).
persistence_mechanism: Continued use of stolen valid cloud credentials/cookies
privilege_escalation: None explicitly described; access granted by compromised cloud account privileges
